verdict_reason: The implication asks the operator to 'first ask what attachment is currently consuming your attention budget' when focus is failing. Reproducible: a senior IC can run this self-audit in real time at the debugger; the diagnostic is the named attachment (promo, demo, manager-impressing artifact). The fix-is-dropping-not-suppression distinction is also reproducible: the operator can check whether suppression is consuming additional attention, by noticing whether the surface-level work quality continues to degrade. Reproducible in real practice. PASS.
